question: GaryClaw Phase 4b on main. No design doc found for this branch. /office-hours produces a structured problem statement, premise challenge, and explored alternatives — it gives this review much sharper input to work with. Takes about 10 minutes. However, the CEO review just completed with a detailed plan document covering scope decisions, design choices, and temporal interrogation. That likely serves as sufficient input. Skip to the eng review?

options.label: Skip — proceed with review (Recommended)
options.description: The CEO plan document is thorough enough to serve as the design input for this eng review. Completeness: 9/10.

options.label: Run /office-hours first
options.description: Produce a formal design doc before reviewing. Adds ~10 min. Completeness: 10/10.

rationale: The CEO plan document already covers scope, design choices, and alternatives — running /office-hours would duplicate that input for marginal completeness gain.
